behavior_summary: Implements an 'end-plate' hit-to-collect mechanic: when the item is struck (U8P_ENDPLATE::gotHit) with a nonzero selector it reads this item's quality/frame to compute an index (quality-1), validates the targeted object's type/frame, and if matched sets one of five elemental collection flags (etherstone, earthstone, waterstone, airstone, firestone).

For a single successful hit the script spawns small ephemeral visual items, plays SFX and runs short FX helpers to animate the response. It sums the five elemental flags and, when all five are set, triggers a larger activation: closes UI/pauses avatar input, spawns a LightningBolt process and a larger FX item, runs a brief multi-frame animation loop on that FX, plays final SFX, then cleans up spawned items.
A companion U8P_ENDPLATE::release() process clears the corresponding elemental flag when the item is removed/released (undoing collected-state for the computed index).

Several helper functions (U8P_ENDPLATE::func03E1, U8P_ENDPLATE::func0453, U8P_ENDPLATE::func05B9, U8P_ENDPLATE::func0617, U8P_ENDPLATE::func0675, U8P_ENDPLATE::func06D3) provide small variant animations: they set item frames (Item::setFrame), playSFX, spawn short-lived FREE helper processes and suspend to time effects. U8P_ENDPLATE::func0453 selects among variants randomly and avoids immediate repeats.
notable_control_flow: U8P_ENDPLATE::gotHit execution is gated by param1 != 0 (param1 acts as the hit selector/target reference).

Main stone-selection index is computed from this item's quality: index = Item::getQuality(this) - 1 and only proceeds if quality-derived index and target frame/type match expected values (Item::getType == 0x0319 and Item::getFrame(target) == index).
On a matching index U8P_ENDPLATE::gotHit sets a single elemental flag (one of etherstone..firestone), creates/pops a small FX item, suspends while a FREE helper runs, then destroys the FX item.

After setting a flag U8P_ENDPLATE::gotHit sums etherstone..firestone; if sum == 5 it runs the final activation sequence (avatar stasis, spawn LightningBolt, create big FX, animate frames 0..4 and clean up).

U8P_ENDPLATE::func0453 uses urandom to pick a variant (1..4), compares against a stored previous choice to prevent repeats, plays variant-specific SFX, then calls one of the frame-setting helpers. Many helpers follow a pattern: setFrame -> spawn FREE::func1C19 -> suspend -> increment frame/index.
open_questions: Exact numeric mapping of quality values to stone identities and whether quality is consumed permanently or only used to index behavior (inferred but not explicit).
Precise semantics and side-effects of the spawned FREE::func1C19 helper (spawn arguments and its visual or timing responsibilities are inferred).
Whether the global flags (etherstone..firestone) persist across saves/rooms or are transient per-object — persistence and broader quest interactions are not explicit in the disassembly.
Exact user-visible consequences of the final LightningBolt activation (reward, door open, progression) beyond the visual/SFX sequence inferred here.

main_function.name: U8P_ENDPLATE::gotHit
main_function.purpose: Respond to an item being hit: compute a stone index from this item's quality, validate the target, mark the corresponding elemental stone flag, run small FX/animation and, when all five stones are collected, trigger a larger combined activation (LightningBolt + large FX + stasis).
entry_conditions: Invoked as U8P_ENDPLATE::gotHit(uword, word) when the item is struck.
Runs primary logic only if the first parameter (param1) is nonzero (acts as selector/target).
Proceeds only when Item::getQuality(this) > 0 and when Item::getType(target) == 0x0319 and Item::getFrame(target) equals computed index.

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPLATE::gotHit
function_map.role: Hit handler: computes stone index, sets elemental flag, spawns single-hit FX, and triggers final activation when all five flags are set.

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPLATE::release
function_map.role: Cleanup/U8P_ENDPLATE::release handler: computes index from this item's quality and clears the corresponding elemental flag (undo collected-state) if appropriate.

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPLATE::func03E1
function_map.role: Small FX/audio helper: play SFX pair, set an item's frame via Item::setFrame, spawn FREE::func1C19 and coordinate timing via suspend.

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPLATE::func0453
function_map.role: Randomized variant dispatcher: choose a random visual/SFX variant (avoiding immediate repeats), play variant SFX and call one of the frame-setting helpers.

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPLATE::func05B9
function_map.role: Frame-setting/animation variant #1: call Item::setFrame for a sequence slot, spawn FX helper and suspend, increment internal index.

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPLATE::func0617
function_map.role: Frame-setting/animation variant #2: same pattern as U8P_ENDPLATE::func05B9 with different index bounds/slot.

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPLATE::func0675
function_map.role: Frame-setting/animation variant #3: same pattern as U8P_ENDPLATE::func05B9 with different index bounds/slot.

function_map.name: U8P_ENDPLATE::func06D3
function_map.role: Frame-setting/animation variant #4: same pattern as U8P_ENDPLATE::func05B9 with different index bounds/slot.

internal_calls.purpose: Play small FX/SFX and update frames as part of per-hit visual response.
Run a randomized multi-frame FX/animation variant sequence (used during larger activation or multi-step visual response).
One randomized visual variant chosen by U8P_ENDPLATE::func0453 to set frames and spawn FX.
One randomized visual variant chosen by U8P_ENDPLATE::func0453 to set frames and spawn FX.
One randomized visual variant chosen by U8P_ENDPLATE::func0453 to set frames and spawn FX.
One randomized visual variant chosen by U8P_ENDPLATE::func0453 to set frames and spawn FX (branch may repeat steps with suspends).

external_calls.purpose: Read this item's quality/frame to compute stone index (index = quality - 1).
Validate the targeted object's type (ensure target is expected type 0x0319 before setting a flag).
Compare target's frame with computed index to confirm which elemental flag to set.
Reset internal reference slot (0x06) to the target before creating ephemeral items (cleanup/prep).
Create ephemeral visual/effect items for single-hit pop and final activation FX.
Place created ephemeral items into the world near the target for visible FX.
Spawn a short-lived helper process to time/drive ephemeral FX sequences (suspended on until effect completes).
Trigger a global/special LightningBolt effect/process when all five elemental flags are collected.
Play audio feedback for hits, variants, and final activation.
Temporarily freeze/unfreeze avatar input during the final activation sequence.
Play paired SFX to accompany the small frame/FX sequence.
Update an item's animation/frame as part of the small FX sequence.
Spawn an external helper and suspend to coordinate timing for the small FX.
Set frame for a specific animation slot as part of the variant sequence.
Spawn short-lived helper for ephemeral visual effect and suspend while it runs.
Compute index to decide which elemental flag to clear when releasing the item.
Validate target type before deciding whether to prevent clearing a flag (if frames match).
Compare target frame to computed index to determine whether a flag should be cleared.
Choose a random variant index and to parameterize spawned FREE helpers for visual variety.

reads.name: etherstone
reads.likely_effect: Used when summing collected progress toward the five-stone activation; read to compute total collected count.

reads.name: earthstone
reads.likely_effect: Used when summing collected progress toward the five-stone activation.

reads.name: waterstone
reads.likely_effect: Used when summing collected progress toward the five-stone activation.

reads.name: airstone
reads.likely_effect: Used when summing collected progress toward the five-stone activation.

reads.name: firestone
reads.likely_effect: Used when summing collected progress toward the five-stone activation.

reads.name: yojustchill
reads.likely_effect: Read by U8P_ENDPLATE::func0453 as a gate; if yojustchill == 0 the randomized sequence runs.

writes.name: etherstone
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 when index 0 (ether) is obtained by a matching hit; cleared by U8P_ENDPLATE::release when appropriate.

writes.name: earthstone
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 when index 1 (earth) is obtained; cleared by U8P_ENDPLATE::release when appropriate.

writes.name: waterstone
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 when index 2 (water) is obtained; cleared by U8P_ENDPLATE::release when appropriate.

writes.name: airstone
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 when index 3 (air) is obtained; cleared by U8P_ENDPLATE::release when appropriate.

writes.name: firestone
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 when index 4 (fire) is obtained; cleared by U8P_ENDPLATE::release when appropriate.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Implements an 'end-plate' hit-to-collect mechanic: when the item is struck (U8P_ENDPLATE::gotHit) with a nonzero selector it reads this item's quality/frame to compute an index (quality-1), validates the targeted object's type/frame, and if matched sets one of five elemental collection flags (etherstone, earthstone, waterstone, airstone, firestone).
